subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1913-03-24 in Paris
subcodes.first_line: Read for him these passages exactly as they were revealed; then say to him that Baha'u'llah had predicted these upheavals
subcodes.first_line_orig: عین این عبارات را برای ایشان بخوانید و بگوئید که چهل سال پیش ازین انقلابات قلم ابهی بکمال صراحت
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @prophecy and fulfillment, @relationship between government and people, @predictions and prophecies, @non-participation in politics
